ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the flight */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the flight */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the flight */,
  "dep_time" INTEGER /* Actual departure time (in local time) */,
  "sched_dep_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled departure time (in local time) */,
  "dep_delay" INTEGER /* Departure delay in minutes */,
  "arr_time" INTEGER /* Actual arrival time (in local time) */,
  "sched_arr_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled arrival time (in local time) */,
  "arr_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Airline carrier code */,
  "flight_number" INTEGER /* Flight number */,
  "tail_number" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport code */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport code */,
  "air_time" INTEGER /* Air time in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance in miles */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the scheduled departure time */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the scheduled departure time */,
  "time_hour" TEXT /* Timestamp of the scheduled departure hour */,
  "delayed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the flight was delayed (1 for delayed, 0 for not delayed) */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pilot */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the crew */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of cargo on the flight */,
  "weather_conditions_origin" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the origin airport at the time of departure */,
  "weather_conditions_destination" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the destination airport at the time of arrival */,
  "cause_of_delay" TEXT /* Reason for any delays */,
  "mitigation_actions" TEXT /* Actions taken to mitigate delays */,
  "fuel_consumption" INTEGER /* Amount of fuel consumed during the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., scheduled, departed, arrived, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination FOREIGN KEY ("destination") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code (e.g., EWR, JFK) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "runway_information" TEXT /* Details about the runways at the airport */,
  "terminal_information" TEXT /* Details about the terminals at the airport */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the airport (e.g., phone, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, customer service) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Hour of the scheduled departure time
